prompt: Build a premium crypto website inspired by TokenLaunch - Launch Your Blockchain Project. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.

How TokenLaunch Works

1

Submit Project

Fill out launch application with whitepaper and tokenomics

2

Verification

Our team reviews project legitimacy and team credibility

3

Launch Date

Your token IDO goes live with whitelisted participants

4

Exchange Listing

Get listed on major DEXs and CEXs with community support

Frequently Asked Questions

TokenLaunch charges a 2% success fee on raised amount. Tier 1 projects pay starting at $50K, Tier 2 at $100K. Premium support packages available.
We recommend: Team 12+ month vest with 6-month cliff, Treasury 24-month vest. Vesting is customizable based on your project needs and community feedback.
Join our whitelist, complete KYC verification (if required), and participate during allocation period. Early backers get bonus allocation. First-come, first-served basis.
Yes, every project undergoes multi-stage verification including team doxxing, smart contract audits, and legal compliance reviews for investor protection.

Ready to Launch Your Token?

Join hundreds of successful projects funded through TokenLaunch
